messages.content:
Kinger: Sorry, Zooble, it's just the perfect regulation softball size!(chuckling)We're not playing baseball here.
Jax: (sighs)I'm not doing this anymore.
Kinger: (As Jax leaves the field)Wait, Jax! What about where is going on?!

Bazooble: I'm Bazooble! Yibba-dooba-dabba-dooba-dubba-dubbi...
Ragatha: Well, that wasn't in my suggestion.
Gangle: Why don't I get an evil clone?

Gangle: He’s right, though.
Zooble: What? Gangle…
Gangle: It doesn’t matter what could’ve happened. We could argue about it and hurt each other all day long, but that’s not going to help anybody. I think… What we need to do now…(sniffles)Is to just be there for each other.

Gloink Queen: Well, B- uh-(Stuttering, not knowing what to say)Y- Yet you're still watching it!.
Jax: I'm not here for the adventure or anything I'm just here to hide from the-
Kinger: Oh, thank god you're okay!(Relieved)You didn't experience a game show in there, did you?

Gloink Queen: Of course they do! I love and cherish every Gloink I give birth to! What kind of mother do you think I am?
Ragatha: ...iss beautiful...
Pomni: Hey, I-I...(She looks back at the Gloink Queen, who is indistinctly speaking to Ragatha.)I-I just... w-want to wish you a pleasant day. Thanks for eating at Spudsy's.

Gangle: (Laughs sarcastically)Next you're gonna say my authority isn't real!
Gangle: Anyway, put away that breakfast menu, because it's lunch time!
Gangle: All right, fellas, it's lunch rush. Get your game faces on!

Jax: Hey, I wasn't done.
Zooble: If you're gonna makeup, at least be creative about it. I know what you're referencing.
Ragatha: Was that a reference to something?

Ragatha: (In the back of the truck.)Why are there so many knives back here?!
Jax: Do it, or I'll tell Ragatha about the figurine thing.
Gangle: (Gasps and then laughs nervously)

Ragatha: Whoa! Kaufmo, Listen! I know we didn't always get along, like when you called me out for fake laughing at your jokes! I swear, I really did think they were funny, I WAS JUST HAVING A BIT OF A BAD DAY!(Abstracted Kaufmo grabs and drags Ragatha, interrupting her)
Ragatha: Hey, Pomni? You think you could perhaps help me out here? I understand... if you don't... want to, though.
Pomni: Ow! I'm sorry!(Runs away in fear)

Abel: All in a good day's work! By the way, you think I could get a raise after that performance?
Caine: (laughs)Oh, you're getting too smart. Time to delete.
Abel: AHH--!!

Jax: Sounds good! Uh, this was a nice dinner and everything but(inhales sharply)...could I go back to the circus? The gals and I were gonna do somethin' which may or may not be a surprise for a special certain ringmaster we want to show our appreciation for.
Caine: GASP! Say no more!
Zooble: How long is Jax gonna take? I feel like we've been standing here for hours.

Martha Mildenhall: (chuckles)Don't mention it. Feel free to visit anytime.
Ragatha: (pulling Jax out the door with a wagon as Gangle follows from behind)Definitely!(She waves as she continues to the exit)
Caine: (A congratulations sign appears, showing they have taken the pacifist route)Congratulations, my little ironclad waffle cones! You've taken the pacifist route, and you should be proud of what good people you are! Unfortunately, we still need to wait until your other teammates finish their adventure before I can grant you permission to leave!

Ragatha: I'll be sure to ask them next time I see 'em.(stands up)Thanks again for the tea. I had a really nice time here.
Martha Mildenhall: (chuckles)Don't mention it. Feel free to visit anytime.
Ragatha: (pulling Jax out the door with a wagon as Gangle follows from behind)Definitely!(She waves as she continues to the exit)

Jax: Eh, I thought a position of power suited you.
Zooble: Oh my god, are these all gonna be Jax's ideas?!
Kinger: Well, Ms. President, it looks like there are some new developments in the ongoing war between Australia and New Zealand. We may need to take in some refugees. What do you think?

Zooble: Yeah, I figured. How about you, Gangle?
Jax: Hey, I wasn't done.
Zooble: If you're gonna makeup, at least be creative about it. I know what you're referencing.

Pomni: So...you wanna...talk...about that?
Jax: I'm in a maid outfit. What do you think?
Ragatha: (Sighs)So, how's the game going?

Sun: Wow, you look mediocre! If you ever need a sunburn, give me a call!
Pomni: I-I don't want a sunburn.
Sun: Should have thought of that before I decided I hate you!

Ragatha: Oh, yeah, of course! Uh, wait, what?
Jax: Looks like that oh-so-positive Ragatha charm is starting to wear off, huh?
Caine: Hmm. Hmm…(Caine flips across multiple sketches of bees)

Jax: I dunno. Like, her comedy mask still breaks every day. Does she think hanging out with Zooble is gonna magically fix that?
Ragatha: Maybe she just doesn't wanna hang out with someone who's mean to her all the time.
Jax: She likes when I'm mean to her, though!

Ragatha: Jax!
Jax: I actually didn't mean to do that.
Ragatha: Are you alright, Gangle?

Jax: How you doin'?
Pomni: Everything's been-(blinks)I'm doing... fine.
Jax: (Sighs)Wish I could say the same.

Gloink Queen: Well, B- uh-(Stuttering, not knowing what to say)Y- Yet you're still watching it!.
Jax: I'm not here for the adventure or anything I'm just here to hide from the-
Kinger: Oh, thank god you're okay!(Relieved)You didn't experience a game show in there, did you?

Ragatha: Oh, Pomni! Kinger! Are you guys okay? Was it scary?
Pomni: I'm fine, actually.(She notices Jax tied up in the wagon)What happened up here?
Ragatha: Uh, don't worry about that.

Jax: I don't want to hear that!(Points then gets arm down)I want you DEAD!
Jax: (drops his bat)Well, guess there's no more ball, we're done.
Kinger: Wait, I got this!(pulls out one of his eyes)Hmm...(pulls out Zooble's ball-shaped eye)

Caine: Bubble, you can't say that.
Zooble: (Disinterested)Mmmmmmmmmmm, nope.(Walking away, from Caine)
Caine: (Starts panicking)Zooble, wait! I-I'm testing out a new AI in this one! It should be 57 times more immersive!

Zooble: Agh!
Strange Customer: (rubbery)Hello, I am ready to order!
Pomni: Oh, uh -- uh, what can I get for you today?

Pomni: (sighs)I think we should get out of the open for a bit.
Jax: (sighs)I haven't been up here in a while.
Pomni: We should just indulge a little while we have the time to. I don't know what Caine has planned next, but I'm guessing it's not anything good.(disappears)

Bubble: Help me, Caine...
Ragatha: Uh, we could also just play softball normally this time.
Caine: In The Caine Leagues, we have the 400 Meter Vertical Skedaddle, Bisection Boogie Eggball, Lateral Hijinks, Orange Sport, Ball Run, Walk Ball, Run Walk, and Ball Ball! These sports are surely going to—

Evil Jax: D-don't worry!(Taps fingers of hands then hands as fists)I think you look good!
Jax: I don't want to hear that!(Points then gets arm down)I want you DEAD!
Jax: (drops his bat)Well, guess there's no more ball, we're done.

Caine: Hello, my little rubber baby buggy bumpers! Today, I've decided to go to the store to get essential ingredients for my signature Milk and Cigarette casserole!
Caine: I hope you can handle yourselves until I get back.
Zooble: Well, this was fun while it lasted.

Zooble: Man, I can't believe Kaufmo just gave up like that.(Sad)I mean, no offense Kinger, but I always thought you would be next.
Kinger: Thank you.(Happy)
Jax: Guess it just goes to show you can't rely on Kinger for anything.

Jax: (sighs)I'm not doing this anymore.
Kinger: (As Jax leaves the field)Wait, Jax! What about where is going on?!
Ragatha: I can't believe I hit it right to her, I'm supposed to be better than that.(sighs)Sorry,(sighs)I should be a better sport.

Pomni: Wh- how do you know what to do? What?
Kinger: Didn't you get the brief?
Pomni: I am... just being here.

Zooble: Are they still following us?
Gangle: Are you still following us?
Jax: Yeah, we're still following you!

Martha Mildenhall: (chuckles)Don't mention it. Feel free to visit anytime.
Ragatha: (pulling Jax out the door with a wagon as Gangle follows from behind)Definitely!(She waves as she continues to the exit)
Caine: (A congratulations sign appears, showing they have taken the pacifist route)Congratulations, my little ironclad waffle cones! You've taken the pacifist route, and you should be proud of what good people you are! Unfortunately, we still need to wait until your other teammates finish their adventure before I can grant you permission to leave!

Gangle: (Embarrassed, holding onto camera)Actually, yeah! We can skip it, that's fine! Let's skip this one!
Pomni: Are we just... chilling for this one? Can I finally relax?
Jax: Uh, I guess so. But, uh, I prefer a little bite to my adventures.

Evil Orbsman: Evil Orbsman, reporting for duty!
Bazooble: I'm Bazooble! Yibba-dooba-dabba-dooba-dubba-dubbi...
Ragatha: Well, that wasn't in my suggestion.

Ragatha: (Groans)Is everybody okay?
Gangle: No...(Puts head down)
Ragatha: Oh, man. Poor Pomni. I hope she's all right.

Zooble: So what if I am? I'm not giving any to YOU.(They cross their arms and scowl at Jax.)
Jax: (hisses through teeth)Darn. I guess you're never gettin' that unicorn horn, Pomni.
Pomni: When did I ever say anything about that?

Caine: Here we have THE TENT! This is where your living quarters are, as well as other sorts of activities! These activities may include-
Caine: -ball pits, mini golf, and more!
Caine: And here we have THE GROUNDS! Drown yourself in the digital lake, or engage in ridery at the digital carnival! Night, day, it's all okay! The choice is yours, a cosmic buffet!

Kinger: I can hear you. Are you ok?
Ragatha: U- Uh, h- Who are you? How do I take this off?
Kinger: I'm... I-

Kinger: MY IMPENETRABLE FORTRESS!
Ragatha: You wanna come with us to check on Kaufmo?
Kinger: No, not really. I think Kaufmo's gone insane. Last time I spoke with him, he was rambling endlessly about some exit. Kind of like you, Pomni! You might be going insane too.

Zooble: You've done more than that. What about your art?
Gangle: I was in community college for graphic design, but I dropped out. I didn't really pursue art much after that.
Zooble: Hey, I'm always down to make art together, if you want.

Caine: Speechless. I can't say I blame you.(Caine turns around)Not every executive is as forgiving as me.
Caine: And that's it for the reviews! You have yourself a nice day.
Caine: I am such a good bo--(Caine glitches into various poses)

Ragatha: Oh, yeah, of course! Uh, wait, what?
Jax: Looks like that oh-so-positive Ragatha charm is starting to wear off, huh?
Caine: Hmm. Hmm…(Caine flips across multiple sketches of bees)

Ragatha: Wait. What's this?
Caine: Hello, my little rubber baby buggy bumpers! Today, I've decided to go to the store to get essential ingredients for my signature Milk and Cigarette casserole!
Caine: I hope you can handle yourselves until I get back.

Zooble: What happened last time? Was that the one made for me?
Pomni: There was this awful, horrifyingangelhead thing. And when we tried to fight back at all, we got sent to Hell, where evil souls tried to infest our bodies... It was bad.
Zooble: (looks up to Caine in confused way)Why did you think I would like that?

Ragatha: You can count on me, Your Highness.(Bows down to the princess)
Princess Loolilalu: Oh, please. Call me Loo.(She reassures Ragatha, can call her by "Loo" instead)
Ragatha: (Chuckles playfully)Will do, Loo.(Does finger guns)

Zooble: Can you give me my eye back?
Bazooble: Joke's on you! I've already forgotten what you're talking about!
Caine: Wowie! Another home run!

Zooble: Agh!
Strange Customer: (rubbery)Hello, I am ready to order!
Pomni: Oh, uh -- uh, what can I get for you today?

Pomni: (Laughing)I have never seen you with a tail.
Jax: When would that have even...(Stammers)
Moon: They look happy.

Pomni: (groans and gets up, also relieving her eyeballs went back in her sockets )Where are we?
Pomni: (turns to a creepy variant of Zooble)Oh, that's...(turns to her creepy variant of herself)Noooo...
Kinger: I wonder what this thing is?(his hand floats to click on the tape)

Jax: Why'd you stop shooting? You out of ammo?
Zooble: Why'd you stop? You out of ammo?
Jax: Pomni, got any ammo left?

Jax: Ugh. See ya.(Walks away from Evil Pomni and lines up to hit the ball)
Jax: (bored)Whoops, I missed.
Jax: (bored)Oh darn, I'm out.(drops his bat and walks away to sit down with Pomni)

Jax: Huh? Oh, cool, I'm not a vegan anymore.
Evil Jax: Oh hey! Wait, what are you-–
Kinger: WHY IS GOING ON?!

Jax: Why'd you stop shooting? You out of ammo?
Zooble: Why'd you stop? You out of ammo?
Jax: Pomni, got any ammo left?

Caine: Hello, my little rubber baby buggy bumpers! Today, I've decided to go to the store to get essential ingredients for my signature Milk and Cigarette casserole!
Caine: I hope you can handle yourselves until I get back.
Zooble: Well, this was fun while it lasted.

Jax: (Annoyed, pointing the shotgun at Gangle)You're violating my ears with your clap-back. Get driving, driver!
Ragatha: So, Pomni, I'm sure there's some way you could help out here. Maybe when we catch up to them, we could-
Jax: We could be assertive. Like this!

Caine: And that makes three home runs in a row, the Big Tops win!
Ragatha: Uh, that's...not how softball works.
Caine: Well, that's how my softball works.(In a little aggravated tone)We're done, hooray!(Caine claps his hands)

Abel: Caine always did have trouble with cube collisions, for some reason.
Abel: Alright, just how we went over it.(points to Jax)You first.
Jax: Me? Why me?

Ragatha: Your kingdom's awesome, by the way.(Looking around the princess's kingdom)Love the vibe.
Princess Loolilalu: (Giggles)I like you already.
Ragatha: Look, Pomni. We're already friends with the princess.(Trying to hype Pomni up, but fails since Pomni feels very sad)

Caine: (A congratulations sign appears, showing they have taken the pacifist route)Congratulations, my little ironclad waffle cones! You've taken the pacifist route, and you should be proud of what good people you are! Unfortunately, we still need to wait until your other teammates finish their adventure before I can grant you permission to leave!
Gangle: I wonder how long that'll be.
Kinger: Not really typical of what you'd think Hell would be.

Pomni: (awkwardly still doesn't believe this is real)Uhhhh, yeah, well, don't worry about it. I'm just gonna go get Caine now.(Gives Ragatha a reassuring smile and runs off to find Caine)
Pomni: (In front of the sleeping quarters)Hello?! Caine?! We…have a bit of an issue here!(Calls out, but gets no response. She realizes the whole place is quiet and checks everywhere)
Pomni: (From behind a wall)Caaaiiine?(She suddenly looks up in shock to see Abstracted Kaufmo roaming around the circus. He notices Pomni with his distorted eyes. Pomni makes a weird freaked out face, and the glitched player charges at her, making Pomni freak out and run)

Jax: These are all the keys I have where I don't know what they go to.
Pomni: Wait. Don't you want to come with us? This could be our one chance to finally leave all this behind.
Jax: (sighs)Sure. Why not?

Ragatha: Don't worry, President Pomni! I believe you can do this!
Jax: There's centipedes in there too.
Ragatha: (Afraid)Just... be sure you know what you're doing!

Jax: (scoffs)Crap.
Gangle: (maniacal laughter.)
Jax: You're just gonna hide in your room?

Caine: Let's go back to the drawing board. Humans just aren't a relatable sculpting material.
Zooble: (groans)You think he's running out of ideas yet, or nah?
Pomni: Do you need help with power, or anything?

Zooble: I'm not doing that again.
Caine: My my, it appears a new human has entered this realm!(Moving his cane around to point at the jester, before pointing in the air)
???: How do I... take this... headset off!?(Is struggling, as her eyes appear to be scribbles at the moment)

Zooble: (sighs)I know. You're probably right, but...
Zooble: It just... really... really sucks...!
Ragatha: We're all in this together.

Pomni: Does he really do that?
Jax: I dunno. Let's ask him! HEY CAINE!
Zooble: Youinghole!

Gangle: I'm calling upper management.
Caine: Mmmmyello?
Gangle: Hey, Caine. We're having a bit of an issue with the employees, and I was wondering if you could maybe have a punishment waiting for them at the end of the day if they do a terrible job?

Ragatha: (In the back of the truck.)Why are there so many knives back here?!
Jax: Do it, or I'll tell Ragatha about the figurine thing.
Gangle: (Gasps and then laughs nervously)

Jax: What's the rush? You got someone waiting for you outside?
Zooble: ...Don't you?
Jax: ..Y-yeah.

???: What?(Eyes minimize as she's looking at Jax, in worried confusion)
Zooble: Shut up, Jax. But yeah, he's right. Welcome to your new home, and your new body.(Their claw points down to the jester's feet)
???: "N-n-new home"? What do you mean?(her eyes dart around)

Jax: (sighs)I'm not doing this anymore.
Kinger: (As Jax leaves the field)Wait, Jax! What about where is going on?!
Ragatha: I can't believe I hit it right to her, I'm supposed to be better than that.(sighs)Sorry,(sighs)I should be a better sport.

Zooble: I have never seen you this upset about something.
Kinger: JAX! BAT!(gives the softball bat to Jax)
Jax: (Directed at Zooble)I'm gonna kill you when this is over.

Kinger: Well, it's good to know he hasn't completely lost his mind.
Jax: He actually asked me to give you this.(He throws the bowling ball at Kinger which knocks him inside, followed by Gangle, and Jax jumping inside the hole)
Kinger: An insect collection?

Ragatha: Pomni! Are you okay? W-What happened?(Runs up to Pomni on the fudge created from the Fudge's melting that caused a splash, with relief and concern for her.)
Pomni: Yeah, I'm fine. I, uh- I made a new friend.
Max: Boss! Where have you been? We got fudged.

Orbsman: (rubbery)That's right, it's me Orbsman! Can I order the classic #57 value meal?
Pomni: Okay, uh, a Number 57.(taps a button on the cash register)
Jax: (looks at Orbsman)Oh, I HAAATE this guy.

Pomni: (Still looking at the lamp)I'm sorry, what?
Jax: Oh yeah! I didn't give you one 'cause I wanted to see what you'd do!
Pomni: (angrily)Thanks, Jax. Appreciate it...

Caine: They do, don't they?
Moon: You think after this, maybe we could-
Caine: WAIT A MINUTE! That's a bad thing!

Gangle: Like is that the name you picked or...
Abel: Yeah. I thought it would be cool. But anyway, first things first, we need to get that key.
Abel: (voiceover as Jax wanders around the circus grounds)In order to get the key, you're going to need to isolate Caine. Try getting him alone– someplace where he'll feel comfortable confiding in you.

Committee Member: Okay...
Caine: But what's an award show without honorable mentions and subcategories?(Jax gets up out of his seat.)That's right -- it's bad!
Caine: (Muffled)Unlike my show, which is good.

Ragatha: (takes a sip from the teacup)Mmm, good tea. Sorry again about your husband killing you and everything.
Martha Mildenhall: (voice echoing softly)Oh, you know how men are. Always having the silliest priorities.
Ragatha: (chuckles wryly)Don't I know it.(She glances at Jax, who is tied up in the corner of the room)

Ragatha: (Groans)Is everybody okay?
Gangle: No...(Puts head down)
Ragatha: Oh, man. Poor Pomni. I hope she's all right.

NPC: He's probably in his office, planning adventures.
Jax: How do we even know we can trust this guy? Has he done anything to prove he's human?
NPC: I've been here longer than any of you.(nervously)I...uh...helped create this place. I'll explain more when we're in the room, but for now...please just trust me. You will not regret it.

Chad: (Stammers)I can't say for sure, but, uh- yes, definitely.
Max: It's not like the boss to vanish with a clown. Very unusual.
Ragatha: Well, that's…concerning.

Pomni: Yeah, Zooble and I constantly say we like more chill and relaxing adventures.
Ragatha: Did you really not like my softball one?
Pomni: I'm not big into sports, sorry.

Princess Loolilalu: Thanks to you brave knights, our kingdom will once again thrive. I'm sure it was no easy task.
Jax: (Under his breath)You have no idea.
Princess Loolilalu: (Portal opens)Farewell, brave knights. Have fun executing that bandit fella!

Caine: Especially if it leads you out into the void. Anyway, it looks like you defeated the Gloink Queen, so I guess the adventure's over. Your reward is a delicious digital feast cooked by our head Bubble Chef.
Bubble: Made with all the love I'm legally allowed to give.(Happy at first but trails off)
Jax: You know, I am pretty hungry.

Zooble: Alright, I'm calling a vote. Let's skip this one... and also make Jax a vegan for the rest of the day.
Jax: You can't do that.
Jax: What do you mean you can do that?!

Jax: (Disappointed)Aww, no more ramming? Guess I have to tell Ragatha about the thing now.
Gangle: What?!
Max: Oh. You're still up here.

Kinger: Caine! Kaufmo went through a sort of Kaufmosis and abstracted!(Still worried)
Caine: Kaufmo abstracted? Why didn't anybody tell me?(Exaggerated, plays a cartoon sound while sticking out his tongue)
Caine: And into the cellar you go.

Pomni: Are you KIDDING ME?!(Finger slips)Ow!
Jax: Nice going, Pomni -- now I have no bridge!
Max: Ah-hah! Gotcha!(Trying to grab Pomni)Me arms aren't long enough to-- Whoa!

Jax: You are in a mood today, aren't you?
Caine: Now, now. You know what they say about assuming. It makes an "ass" out of "u" and "Ming".
Zooble: Ming?

Jax: Honestly, are you even trying?
Zooble: Shut up, Jax.
Pomni: Where'd Caine go?

Jax: Wait, what?
Caine: Motivation! That's what my adventures have been missing! Great idea, Gangle. I'll be sure to make something truly awful awaiting your rotten employees.(He hangs up)
Jax: (Angry but confused)Why would you do this?

Caine: Golly, uh, we're running out of humans here.(laughs nervously)Now, don't you go abstracting on me, too!(laughs nervously)Uh, seriously.
Ragatha: (stammers)Uh, wh- What- Hello? Uh, guys? I, uh- I- I can't figure out how to- Guys? Hello? Can you help me out here?
Ragatha: What's- What's happening? Uh, can anybody hear me?

Ragatha: You never let us feel like we're at home! You don't comfort anyone when they're upset, and you never bother to understand what it's like in our shoes!
Gangle: (Gangle's white mask has liquid tears on Gangle's two eyes)You discourage us from thinking outside the box and doing things our own way!
Jax: You lie to us constantly!

Jax: (Clears throat)As I was saying. I happen to know a way into the kingdom walls(pulls out the key that Ragatha had, while Ragatha notices the key is not in her pocket)if you'd be willing to help us out in return.
Ragatha: Hey, when did you-
Jax: Shut up, Licorice-Hair.

Caine: Wowie! Another home run!
Coach Dictatorer: GOD DIT!!!
Zooble: What? Uh, okay?(drops their bat as Evil Orbsman stomps furiously)

Jax: How you doin'?
Pomni: Everything's been-(blinks)I'm doing... fine.
Jax: (Sighs)Wish I could say the same.

Gangle: It's just... gonna be strange. I've only known you like this. Will it be the same when it's... real?
Zooble: It always was real. Everything we felt. Everything we've done. Everything we are. It'll never leave us. And I wouldn't have it any other way.
Gangle: (laughs and sniffles)Thank you... for always being there when I needed.(laughs tearfully as Jax pants softly.)

Zooble: Wh—HIM!?
Jax: Wait, what am I doing? I wasn't paying attention—
Jax: (Clicks tongue)Oh.

Zooble: OH GOD! SOMEBODY HELP!
Jax: Oh no, they killed Zooble. Anyway, you guys wanna go get something to eat?
Ragatha: ...Oh wait, we should go check on Kaufmo! I'm pretty sure he'd like to meet Pomni!

Kinger: Are you upset we lost?
Kinger: Or are you upset about something else?
Kinger: You wanna talk about it?

Chad: D'you think your mum's gonna pull through if we get all this back to the village?
Max: I'm sure she will. This much syrup would save hundreds of people.
Gummigoo: We won't know for sure until we get back to the village. She's a fighter, though. She taught me everything I know.(Looks back in binoculars)Oy! Don't get too comfy, lads. Looks like they've sent someone after us.

Pomni: When we all get out...I'll buy you a beer.
Abel: Make the right choice.
Pomni: Uh.....

Jax: Gimme a whiskey sour. But hold the egg white, since I'm a vegan. Wha-- I hate this! How is this even possible? I thought Caine couldn't--
Zooble: I could have made it way worse for you.
Jax: Well, I'm calling a vote to turn Zooble into a slug.

Jax: (with a very serious annoyed face turns his head slowly to Gangle while talking)You did not just make that today's adventure.
Caine: That's right! You've shown enough leadership skills today to be the perfect shift manager! Of course. Of course! I'm already getting tons of ideas! Haha--
Caine: That was weird.

Kinger: Listen... No matter whats happens, I'll always-
Caine: And into the cellar you go!
Caine: Golly, uh, we're running out of humans here.(laughs nervously)Now, don't you go abstracting on me, too!(laughs nervously)Uh, seriously.

Gangle: Why not?
Jax: Uh- Uh- Wait- Uh- Wait, wait- Uh- Wait- Um- No- Nobody can see this, right?
Gangle: It's time for your employee reevaluation.

Kinger: I think so.
Kinger: (sighs)It sure has been a while. I may need some time to get my bearings. Try to help the others distract Caine while I figure this out. He may sense something when I really get into it.
Pomni: O-Okay. I'll do that. Thank you, by the way. For this and, well... everything.

Pomni: No, the adventure hasn't even started yet.
Zooble: Oh, well, don't be a narc. Find your own hiding spot.
